75256.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
75256.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk
